releaseNotes: Urgent fix: multichannel (5.1/7.1) movies/shows still crashed after v1.14.33 - this device's AudioTrack genuinely cannot allocate ANY discrete PCM track above 2 channels, confirmed live for both a direct 6-channel and a padded 8-channel request, both failing identically. Multichannel audio now downmixes to real stereo instead of padding to 8, which is the one approach with direct, repeated proof of actually working on this hardware. New: a video decoder that corrupts or freezes on real playback is now detected automatically from excessive dropped frames and permanently avoided on that device from then on. Performance: poster/backdrop images now decode at half the memory and CPU cost, cutting janky scrolling on low-RAM devices. Fix: a Dolby Vision decoder variant (DVAV) wasn't being filtered out like its DVHE counterpart. Tweak: buffer depth increased slightly on the Smooth profile.
